notes: Grid-model estimates at city-centroid coordinates systematically underestimate urban PM2.5 in Vietnam. Factor 2.25 updated from 1.85 to better match AQICN ground truth (avg error ~5% with 2.25x).

Grid-model PM10 also underestimated. Using same factor 2.25x as PM2.5 to keep proportional consistency across all particulate pollutants. Individual PM10 overlap data insufficient for independent factor.
O3 from atmospheric model is less biased; no correction applied.
NO2 from atmospheric model shows moderate urban underestimation.
CO unit conversion already correct; calibration not needed.
SO2 not primary concern in Vietnam urban areas; no correction needed.
